# FrequencyWords dictionary data

DeviceSync Keyboard includes the following unmodified dictionary data files:

- `keyboard-ime/src/main/assets/dictionaries/ru_50k.txt`
- `keyboard-ime/src/main/assets/dictionaries/en_50k.txt`

Source: <https://github.com/hermitdave/FrequencyWords>

Upstream commit: `525f9b560de45753a5ea01069454e72e9aa541c6`

Original data: OpenSubtitles 2018 frequency lists generated by the FrequencyWords project.

The upstream project states that its generated content is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International. The files are included without modification. The complete license text is stored in `LICENSE-CC-BY-SA-4.0.txt`.

No endorsement by the FrequencyWords contributors or OpenSubtitles is implied.
